title: GPT-5.5 is a total freak
summary: A YouTube review of OpenAI's GPT-5.5 model examining its capabilities across multiple domains including digital rendering, medical imaging, coding, and 3D game development. The reviewer demonstrates the model's performance on tasks like cancer detection, ray tracing, music composition, and conversational depth while discussing benchmarks and practical applications.
